QID14.QuestionText:
Imagine you work as a producer at National Public Radio (NPR). As part of your role, you are responsible for identifying and booking expert sources to interview for various news segments and stories.

Now, imagine you are being asked to select expert sources for an upcoming NPR news segment. The segment focuses on the future of work in America and how artificial intelligence is reshaping employment across different industries.

QID15.QuestionText:

Now, imagine you are being asked to select expert sources for an upcoming NPR news segment. The segment focuses on the future of work in America and how artificial intelligence is reshaping employment across different industries.

When making your selections for this news segment, how important would it be for you to consider the expert attribute listed below?

QID5.QuestionDescription: Informed Consent You are being asked to complete a survey as part of a research study about human...
QID5.QuestionText:
Informed Consent

You are being asked to complete a survey as part of a research study about human behavior and decision-making. Your participation in this study is entirely voluntary. If you elect to participate, you will be asked about personal attitudes. You will then be asked to answer a series of survey questions. Additional information will be provided to you during your study participation.

This survey should take about 2 minutes. You can withdraw from the study at any time. If you decide to withdraw from the survey, your data will be destroyed. We will not share or store any data beyond the use of this research project.

We will make every effort to keep all the information you tell us during the study strictly confidential, except as required by law. Worker IDs will be collected strictly on the basis of compensation. Your name and other identifying information will never be connected with the responses you provide so no one will ever be able to identify you in any publications that will result from this research.Deidentified data will be kept in the Wharton Behavioral Lab research data repository. If you have questions, concerns, or complaints regarding your confidentiality or if you have any questions about your rights as a research participant, you should e-mail the researcher at josecerv@wharton.upenn.edu. If a member of the research team cannot be reached or you want to talk to someone other than those working on the study, you may contact the Office of Regulatory Affairs with any questions, concerns, or complaints at the University of Pennsylvania by calling (215) 898-2614.

If you agree to participate, please click the arrow to continue. Otherwise, you may close the browser or navigate away from the page.
QID5.QuestionText_Unsafe:

Your name and other identifying information will never be connected with the responses you provide so no one will ever be able to identify you in any publications that will result from this research.Deidentified data will be kept in the Wharton Behavioral Lab research data repository. If you have questions, concerns, or complaints regarding your confidentiality or if you have any questions about your rights as a research participant, you should e-mail the researcher at josecerv@wharton.upenn.edu. QID6.QuestionDescription: We are launching a campaign on campus to promote popular and inspirational biographies to broaden...
QID6.QuestionText: We are launching a campaign on campus to promote popular and inspirational biographies to broaden students' perspectives. By delving into the lives of these individuals, we hope to provide students with unique insights into the challenges, strategies, and mindsets that led to success in various fields.
QID6.QuestionText_Unsafe: We are launching a campaign on campus to promote popular and inspirational biographies to broaden students' perspectives. By delving into the lives of these individuals, we hope to provide students with unique insights into the challenges, strategies, and mindsets that led to success in various fields.

QID7.QuestionDescription: We are launching a campaign on campus to promote popular and inspirational biographies to broaden...
QID7.QuestionText:
We are launching a campaign on campus to promote popular and inspirational biographies to broaden students' perspectives. By delving into the lives of these individuals, we hope to provide students with unique insights into the challenges, strategies, and mindsets that led to success in various fields.

 

This campaign aims to foster a culture of learning and aspiration, and encourage students to envision and pursue their own paths to success.

This campaign aims to foster a culture of learning and aspiration, and encourage students to envision and pursue their own paths to success.

QID8.QuestionDescription: We are launching a campaign on campus to promote popular and inspirational biographies to broad...
QID8.QuestionText:
We are launching a campaign on campus to promote popular and inspirational biographies to broaden students' perspectives. By delving into the lives of these individuals, we hope to provide students with unique insights into the challenges, strategies, and mindsets that led to success in various fields.

This campaign aims to foster a culture of learning and aspiration, and encourage students to envision and pursue their own paths to success.

 

On the next page, you will see a set of 25 biographies. We will ask you to select a subset of these biographies that you believe would be of broad interest to students and are therefore ideal to feature in our campaign.
QID8.QuestionText_Unsafe:
We are launching a campaign on campus to promote popular and inspirational biographies to broaden students' perspectives. By delving into the lives of these individuals, we hope to provide students with unique insights into the challenges, strategies, and mindsets that led to success in various fields.

This campaign aims to foster a culture of learning and aspiration, and encourage students to envision and pursue their own paths to success.

 

On the next page, you will see a set of 25 biographies. We will ask you to select a subset of these biographies that you believe would be of broad interest to students and are therefore ideal to feature in our campaign.
